items.channel_label: Jack Roberts — UK tech founder, 7-figure AI automation business
items.title: Hermes Agent + MiniMax M3 is CRAZY
items.description:
Hermes is the best agent available. But most people are overpaying for worse results.

The problem isn't Hermes.
It's running every task through the same model.
Some tasks need heavy models. Others don't.
Mismatching burns tokens.
Quality drops.
Assign the right model to each task.
Costs drop.
Results improve.

Like hiring a surgeon to sort your mail. Overkill burns money. Nothing improves.

Right model, right task. That's the lever everyone overlooks. Start there.

#hermes #aiagent #aimodel #aiperformance #productivity

items.title: Claude Just Got An Insane Update, And This Is The Only Tutorial You Need (Free)
items.description:
🔗 RESOURCES (all free in the community): https://links.stayingahead.com/YT52

Claude just got a massive design update, and in this one tutorial you'll turn a single video into five real, on-brand designs, a slide deck, an infographic, a carousel, an animation, and a full landing page, without touching Canva or hiring a designer. And right at the end, how to do all of it for free.

This is the only Claude Design walkthrough you need. We start inside Claude (claude.ai), open the new Design tool, and build everything step by step in plain English, no coding, no design skills. You'll set up your own brand once as a design system, then watch every build come out in your colours and fonts automatically. Then we ship the landing page to Claude Code, cover the new shared usage pool that makes this update actually usable, and finish with Open Design, the free, open-source alternative you can run on a ChatGPT subscription you may already have.

If you've ever wanted to make presentations, infographics, Instagram carousels, launch videos, and landing pages with AI, this is the full masterclass.

▶️ WATCH NEXT
The full Claude Code walkthrough: https://youtu.be/cSOpT-vCXck?si=s5GPDC6CNb0a0kHk

🔔 Subscribe for detailed AI builds that make you more capable at your work.

#ClaudeDesign #ClaudeAI #AITutorial #AIDesign

items.title: When to Cut Underperforming Properties
items.description:
Harsh reality:
Bad Operators add headcount.
Good Operators add process. 
Best Operators remove both.

Deletion is always the highest efficiency improvement.

items.channel_label: Build Great Products — AI product design, app advising
items.title: Even apps that look like AI slop can still make money (here's how)
items.description:
Even apps that look like AI slop can still make money.

You just have to make sure you do this one thing...

Solve a painful problem for a specific customer.

Hack 2 Hire is a great example of that.

An app making $40k+ MRR that helps software engineers practice interview questions in order to help them land their next job.

Proof that your app doesn't have to look (that) great to make money.

Comment 'BUILD' below and I'll send you a link to learn how to build apps like this.

items.title: Don't Fall For This AI Trap
items.description:
This is the biggest mistake I see people making with AI.

We’ve all fallen into the trap of trying to use AI for EVERYTHING. But the difference between an AI novice and a power user is knowing when to step back.

The goal isn't to automate your entire life. It's to know which tasks AI should automate, which ones it should help with, and which ones are still better left to humans.

That’s exactly what I’ll be covering in my webinar with @TeachableTV  as part of their AI Academy.

We'll go through a practical framework for deciding what to automate (and what not to), real-world AI workflows you can start using immediately, common automation mistakes to avoid, and how to use AI as a collaborator without sacrificing your own creativity and judgment.

Register at the link in the comments. And while you're there, let me know: what's something you've tried to automate with AI that completely flopped?

#teachablepartner #AIforbusiness #contentcreation #Ai #aiagents

items.channel_label: Michia Rohrssen — post-exit founder, product validation via ads, L7V fund
items.title: Give Me 60 Seconds and I'll Teach You How to Make $1M
items.description:
Want the step by step? Download my Founders Playbook for free here: https://l7v.com/yt-playbook

How to make $1M with a business idea you don't even have to invent.
Here's the full system in 60 seconds.

Find a disrupted market. Steal the idea from free consulting reports (McKinsey, Bain, BCG). Validate the gap by talking to real customers. Then run the simple math that tells you if it's a million dollar idea.

The math is the part everyone skips.

Multiply your potential customers by your annual price. If that number clears $1B, you only need a 1% sliver to build a serious business.

Play in a big enough market and the size does the heavy lifting for you.

Watch this next: https://youtu.be/y5ks4FhoGfQ

#millionairemindset #businessideas #entrepreneurship

Seedance 2.0 4K is now inside Higgsfield, and in this video I test the model to see why it stands out and how good the results actually look.

We’ll look at the 4K quality, viral short-form trends, fruit ASMR prompting, how to use Higgsfield, how to create 16x9 commercial ads, product shot examples, character consistency, and a multi shot coffee ad workflow.

If you’re interested in AI video generation, cinematic AI scenes, text-to-video, image-to-video, or using Higgsfield to create better AI videos, this tutorial gives you a full hands-on look at what Seedance 2.0 4K can do.

I’ll show real examples, break down the results, and explain where this model feels strongest, how it handles commercial-style generations and character consistency, and whether it is worth using for AI filmmaking and content creation.

Thanks to Higgsfield for sponsoring this video.
